styleProfile.summary: Analyzed 51 ARV reference thumbnails: predominantly dark, high-contrast, dominant compositions dark-background, center-heavy, title-band. Average brightness 0.21, contrast 0.82. Recurring motifs: signal / transmission.
typographyNotes: clean lower third reserved for footer
negativeStyleRules: no readable AI-generated text in the background
no celebrity likeness or copyrighted characters

foundryIqMemory.query: Welche kuratierten ARV-Style-Regeln, Paletten und Titelmuster gelten fuer ein YouTube-Livestream-Thumbnail von Audioreworkvisions / Techno Transmissions? Welche Negative Rules und verbotenen Stilbrueche muessen fuer ein Techno-Thumbnail beachtet werden? Welche Prompt-DNA-Fragmente und Layout-Muster passen zu einem 16:9 Techno-Thumbnail mit lokal gerendertem Titeltext?
patterns: The central idea: **the app does not just generate random titles and thumbnails — it uses Azure AI Foundry IQ as a Creative Brand Memory.** Before generating, the studio retrieves curated ARV style rules, past thumbnail patterns, negative rules, and prompt-DNA from Foundry IQ, and the UI shows exactly which memory and knowledge sources influenced each creative decision (the **Foundry IQ Memory Used** and **Creative Decision Explanation** panels).

```json
{
 "id": "arv-minimal-signal-geometry",
 "name": "ARV Minimal Signal Geometry",
 "version": "2026-06-05",
 "category": "abstract-loop",
 "family": "arv-signal-systems",
 "description": "Minimal black-background CRT signal geometry for hypnotic techno GIF loops: thin linework, orbital rectangles, scan pulses, symmetric signal diagrams, cyan/magenta/amber accents, analog grain, controlled loop payoff.",
 "style_rules": [
 "Use a deep black void as the main stage.",
 "Ke
continuity:
generationPromptTemplate: `
A minimal abstract motion-graphics loop on a deep black CRT background. 
One central geometric signal object: {{motif}}. 
The object performs one controlled motion event: {{motionEvent}}. 
Use thin luminous linework, cyan-magenta chromatic edge split, warm ivory signal lines, subtle amber accents, analog scanlines, VHS grain, soft halation, and black negative space. 
The motion is calm, technical, hypnotic, and loop-ready: reveal -> shift -> hold -

citations.excerpt: The central idea: **the app does not just generate random titles and thumbnails — it uses Azure AI Foundry IQ as a Creative Brand Memory.** Before generating, the studio retrieves curated ARV style rules, past thumbnail patterns, negative rules, and prompt-DNA from Foundry IQ, and the UI shows exactly which memory and knowledge sources influenced each creative decision (the **Foundry IQ Memory Used** and **Creative Decision Explanation** panels).

5. **Local title rendering** — Composes the final 1920×1080 thumbnail locally with `sharp` + an SVG overlay, so the exact, intended title text is always rendered crisply (never garbled by an image model). Includes the fixed ARV slogan `PEACE LOVE TECHNO` and the `TECHNO TRANSMISSIONS` topline.

concept.shortConcept: Hardgroove session — DARK UNDERGROUND HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSION

titleVariants.title: HARDGROOVE SIGNAL RITUAL
titleVariants.subtitle: RAW UNDERGROUND TRANSMISSION
titleVariants.reason: Direct, ritualistic language with strong signal focus; fits ARV hardgroove identity.

titleVariants.title: MACHINE GROOVE UNDERGROUND
titleVariants.subtitle: DARK HARDGROOVE BROADCAST
titleVariants.reason: Machine-driven phrasing with underground weight and broadcast tone.

titleVariants.title: RAW SIGNAL HARDGROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: ANALOG RESISTANCE SESSION
titleVariants.reason: Stripped-down and aggressive; emphasizes rawness and resistance.

titleVariants.title: SUBTERRANEAN GROOVE SYSTEM
titleVariants.subtitle: HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSION
titleVariants.reason: System-based language with subterranean pressure and movement.

titleVariants.title: NOISE PULSE HARDGROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: DARK MACHINE RITUAL
titleVariants.reason: Noise and pulse pairing creates physical, hypnotic tension.

titleVariants.title: VOID FREQUENCY GROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: UNDERGROUND HARDGROOVE SIGNAL
titleVariants.reason: Void and frequency evoke depth and transmission aesthetics.

titleVariants.title: AFTER MIDNIGHT GROOVE SIGNAL
titleVariants.subtitle: HARDGROOVE BROADCAST
titleVariants.reason: Temporal mood with broadcast framing; darker late-hour energy.

titleVariants.title: RESISTANCE GROOVE TRANSMISSION
titleVariants.subtitle: RAW HARDGROOVE SESSION
titleVariants.reason: Political-machine undertone aligned with hardgroove drive.

titleVariants.title: ANALOG NOISE GROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: DARK HARDGROOVE RITUAL
titleVariants.reason: Analog and noise cues with ritual framing.

titleVariants.title: SYSTEM FAILURE GROOVE
titleVariants.subtitle: UNDERGROUND HARDGROOVE SIGNAL
titleVariants.reason: Disruptive system language; slightly more abstract but still on-brand.

concept.description: Raw Hardgroove Techno transmission from the underground. Dark, machine-driven rhythm, analog Xerox visuals and relentless signal pressure. Audioreworkvisions broadcasts a hardgroove ritual where groove meets system resistance and body syncs with noise. PEACE LOVE TECHNO
concept.layout: Background-only composition (center-heavy); full bleed analog texture with a clear central title safe-area.
concept.backgroundPrompt:
Hardgroove broadcast scene, dark, underground mood, theme: DARK UNDERGROUND HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSION. Visual motifs: waveform/signal background, xerox grain, scanlines, analog broadcast residue. Foundry IQ patterns: The central idea: **the app does not just generate random titles and thumbnails — it uses Azure AI Foundry IQ as a Creative Brand Memory.** Before generating, the studio retrieves curated ARV style rules, past thumbnail patterns, negative rules, and prompt-DNA from Foundry IQ, and the UI shows exactly which memory and knowledge sources influenced each creative decision (the **Foundry IQ Memory Used** and **Creative Decision Explanation** panels).; ```json

- 16:9 YouTube thumbnail background
- no readable text
- leave clear space for title overlay
- dark analog techno transmission aesthetic
- damaged photocopy / black paper texture
- cyan / amber / magenta accents
- high contrast
- readable composition
- no logos
- no watermark
- no celebrity likeness
- no copyrighted characters
- no generated words
concept.negativePrompt: readable text, letters, words, typography, logos, watermark, signature, celebrity likeness, copyrighted characters, glossy EDM festival wallpaper, cute mascots, low contrast mush, blurry, no readable ai-generated text in the background, no logos or watermarks, no celebrity likeness or copyrighted characters, no glossy edm festival wallpaper

creativeDecision.whyTitle: "HARDGROOVE SIGNAL RITUAL" was selected because it is short, uppercase and built from the ARV word field, matching Audioreworkvisions / Techno Transmissions tone without generic EDM language.
creativeDecision.whyTheme: Theme "DARK UNDERGROUND HARDGROOVE TRANSMISSION" fits the Hardgroove vibe and the dark/underground mood.
creativeDecision.whyLayout: Layout: Background-only composition (center-heavy); full bleed analog texture with a clear central title safe-area.
creativeDecision.whyPalette: Palette red, black, deep-blue, amber, grey, magenta was derived from the analyzed ARV reference profile and Foundry IQ palette guidance.
creativeDecision.whyLocalText: The exact title is rendered locally via Sharp + SVG because AI image generators frequently misspell text; the background only provides scene and posterspace.
